questions.question: Define agile process and its key characteristics. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Agile process is a flexible approach that emphasizes collaboration and customer satisfaction. Key characteristics include flexibility, iterative development, continuous improvement, and rapid delivery.

questions.question: What is the primary focus of Extreme Programming (XP) in an agile process? (5 marks)
questions.hint: XP focuses on technical practices such as pair programming, continuous integration, and refactoring to improve software quality and reduce defects.

questions.question: Which of the following is not a key principle of Scrum, a popular agile process model? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Scrum emphasizes transparency, collaboration, and iterative development. Specialization is not a key principle of Scrum.
